plugins.name: structured-madr-mif
plugins.description: Validate structured-MADR ADRs as MIF (Modeled Information Format) at a user-selected conformance level (1|2|3, set in .github/config.yml). Ships a per-level projector and Ajv2020 validator, vendored + checksum-pinned MIF schemas, an ADR-typing ontology, the mif-compliance authoring skill, the /mif-validate and /mif-project commands, an adr-mif-author agent, and an authoring-time PostToolUse hook.
